# openai_model_response_input_items (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving input items for an OpenAI model response



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `response_id` (String)

### Optional

- `after` (String)
- `before` (String)
- `include` (List of String)
- `limit` (Number)
- `order` (String)

### Read-Only

- `first_id` (String)
- `has_more` (Boolean)
- `input_items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input_items))
- `last_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--input_items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input_items`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
